introSection: Silver Streak is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada. The ride was built by Vekoma and opened in 2001 as one of the first inverted family roller coasters. Construction began on the ride in 2000. The theme is a passenger train.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Blue Track and supports, used to have red track and cyan supports.

fullText:
Silver Streak is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada. The ride was built by Vekoma and opened in 2001 as one of the first inverted family roller coasters. Construction began on the ride in 2000. The theme is a passenger train.



Blue Track and supports, used to have red track and cyan supports.
